retakes.no_permissions: You don't have permission to use this command.
retakes.queue.joined: You have been placed in the waiting queue.
retakes.queue.waiting: The game is currently full with {green}{0}{default} players. You are in the waiting queue.
retakes.queue.replaced_by_vip: You have been replaced by {gold}{1}{default} player {green}{0}{default}.
retakes.queue.vip_took_place: You have taken {green}{0}{default}'s place in the game for being {gold}{1}{default}.
retakes.teams.scramble: The terrorists won {green}{0}{default} rounds in a row. {purple}Teams are being scrambled!
retakes.teams.almost_scramble: The terrorists have won {green}{0}{default} rounds in a row - if they win {green}{1} more, {purple}teams will be scrambled.
retakes.teams.win_streak: The terrorists have won {green}{0}{default} rounds in a row!
retakes.teams.win_streak_over: The CTs have ended a {green}{0}{default}-round long win streak!
retakes.teams.admin_scramble: {0} has set the teams to be scrambled next round.
garden.no_permission: You don't have permission to use this command.
garden.mode.unknown: Unknown mode {red}{0}{default}. Modes: retakes, duels, executes, faststrat, edit.
garden.edit.started: {purple}EDIT MODE{default} — no bomb, no timer. Admins: {green}!gedit{default} opens the editor menu.
garden.edit.stopped: Edit mode over — restarting the game.
garden.edit.not_active: Edit mode is not active — {green}!gamemode edit{default} first.
garden.edit.menu_hint: Editor open: {green}R{default} cycles, {green}E{default} selects, {green}TAB{default} closes — you can keep moving!
garden.edit.arena_name_usage: Type {green}!name <arena name>{default} in chat (spaces allowed, e.g. !name A Site VS Long).
garden.edit.arena_created: Arena {green}{0}{default} created and selected — set its ends with the menu.
garden.edit.no_selection: Nothing selected — cycle to an arena/strategy first (or create one).
garden.mode.coming_soon: {purple}{0}{default} is not implemented yet — coming soon!
garden.mode.error_match_in_progress: Cannot change mode while a match is in progress.
garden.smallserver.on: {purple}Small-server mode ON{default} — faster rounds for a small crew!
garden.smallserver.off: {purple}Small-server mode OFF{default} — back to full retakes.
garden.duels.no_arenas: No duel arenas on this map — flag spawn pairs with {green}!gspawn add ... {0}{default} first.
garden.duels.started: {purple}DUELS{default} mode started — {green}{0}{default} arenas ready. Win your 1v1s!
garden.duels.queued: You are in the duel queue ({0} waiting).
garden.duels.invited: {green}{0}{default} challenges you to a duel ({1})! Type {green}!duel accept{default} or {red}!duel decline{default}.
garden.duels.already_challenging: One of you is already in a challenge.
garden.duels.challenge_cancelled: The challenge was cancelled — back to the rotation.
garden.duels.arena_created: Arena {green}{0}{default} created — end A saved here. Walk to the other side and {green}!garena setb {0}{default}.
garden.exec.no_strategies: No playable execute strategies on this map — create some with {green}!gexec new <name> <a|b>{default}.
garden.exec.created: Strategy {green}{0}{default} @{1} created — you are editing it. Add positions with !gexec tstart / ctsetup.
garden.exec.not_editing: You are not editing a strategy — !gexec new or !gexec edit first.
garden.exec.no_throw: No captured throw — throw the grenade first, then !gexec nade.
garden.exec.weight_usage: Usage: !gexec weight <0-100> — 0 = never picked randomly, higher = more frequent.
garden.fs.no_strategies: No playable strategies for Fast-strat — create some with {green}!gexec{default} first.
garden.fs.started: {purple}FAST-STRAT{default} mode started — {green}{0}{default} strategies. Ts vote with !strat, CTs with !setup!
garden.fs.wrong_side: This vote is for the {purple}{0}{default} side.
garden.fs.unknown: Strategy {red}{0}{default} not found (or incomplete). !strat list to see them.
garden.fs.playing: T strat {green}{0}{default} vs CT setup {purple}{1}{default} — FIGHT!
garden.gconfig.apply_note: Applied live where possible — construction-time settings apply next map.
garden.spawn.not_ready: Spawn services are not ready yet (map still loading?).
garden.spawn.usage: Usage: !gspawn <add|del|move|flag|info|test|round> — see !gspawn add t a duel
garden.spawn.need_alive: You need an alive pawn for this.
garden.spawn.too_close: Too close to an existing spawn (72u).
garden.spawn.test: Spawn {green}{0}/{1}{default} — {purple}{2}{default} @{3}. Repeat to jump to the next one.
garden.spawn.round_forced: Dry-run rounds forced on site {green}{0}{default} by {1}. Use !gspawn round off to stop.
garden.spawn.round_off: Forced site cleared — back to random sites.

ranked.available: [GOLD]Ranked Retakes[NORMAL] is available! Type [GREEN]/rr[NORMAL] or [GREEN]/ranked[NORMAL] to start a vote.
ranked.vote_started: [GOLD]{0}[NORMAL] wants to play [GOLD]Ranked Retakes[NORMAL]! Type [GREEN]/ry[NORMAL] to accept or [RED]/rn[NORMAL] to decline ({1}s).
ranked.vote_failed: The Ranked Retakes vote [RED]failed[NORMAL]. Staying unranked.

ranked.no_vote_in_progress: There is no vote in progress.
ranked.not_eligible: You are not eligible for this vote (join a team before it starts).
ranked.not_enough_players: Ranked Retakes needs at least [GOLD]{0}[NORMAL] players on teams.
ranked.activated: [GOLD]Ranked Retakes is now ACTIVE![NORMAL] ELO is on the line. Play smart!

cr.ranked_active: Ranked Retakes is active - stop it before starting a CR match.

cr.setup_started: [GOLD]{0}[NORMAL] opened a [GOLD]Competitive Retakes[NORMAL] setup! Arrange the teams ({1}) during warmup, then type [GREEN]/cr[NORMAL] to start or [RED]/cr cancel[NORMAL] to abort.
cr.setup_cancelled: The Competitive Retakes setup was [RED]cancelled[NORMAL] - back to classic retakes.
cr.invalid_team_sizes: Competitive Retakes needs balanced [GOLD]{0}[NORMAL] teams. Sort the sides first!
cr.vote_started: [GOLD]{0}[NORMAL] wants a [GOLD]Competitive Retakes {1}v{2}[NORMAL] match with the current sides! Type [GREEN]/ry[NORMAL] to accept or [RED]/rn[NORMAL] to decline ({3}s).
